title: CALL_ID string coupling between build_request and extract_response
description: methods.rs uses a module-level string constant CALL_ID='r1' shared between build_request() and every extract_response() call. The comment at line 434 says 'do not change without updating both.' A contributor adding a second method call to a batch request will reuse build_request (which always uses CALL_ID) and then extract_response with CALL_ID, silently matching the wrong invocation when the server returns responses in a different order. There is no type-level guarantee that the call ID passed to extract_response matches the one embedded in the request. The maintenance consequence is: multi-call batching is blocked by an undocumented invariant, and any attempt to extend batching will produce subtly wrong behavior rather than a compile error.
